system.description: Scrap is assorted chunks of metal, wood, and any other material that might prove useful. It can be used to make field repairs on most damaged or broken equipment. Any item fixed with scrap is likely to break again. Every time you use a piece of equipment that has had field repairs done to it, roll an Engineering save, else the repairs come undone. Most items can be scrapped regardless of condition to gain 1 scrap per Load.
